x-enumeration-literals.name: Accepted
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the quote is accepted for further negotiation.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CancelSymbol
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that all quotes are cancelled for a financial instrument's symbol.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CancelSecurity
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that all quotes are cancelled for a specific security.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CancelUnderlying
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that all quotes are cancelled for an underlying financial instrument.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CancelAll
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that all quotes are cancelled.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Rejected
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the quote is not accepted.

x-enumeration-literals.name: RemovedFromMarket
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that all quotes are removed from the market.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Expired
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the quote is not valid anymore.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Query
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the quote is being requested.

x-enumeration-literals.name: QuoteNotFound
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that no quote can be computed or communicated.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Pending
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the quote is being processed.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Pass
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the counterparty is not interested in the transaction.

x-enumeration-literals.name: LockedMarketWarning
x-enumeration-literals.description: Warning due to a situation of locked market.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CrossMarketWarning
x-enumeration-literals.description: Warning due to a situation of cross market.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CanceledDueToLockMarket
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the quote is canceled due to a situation of locked market.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CanceledDueToCrossMarket
x-enumeration-literals.description: Indicates that the quote is canceled due to a situation of cross market.
